results.input: PG&E Pacific Gas and Electric energy efficiency business rebates and small business grants for Northern California 2025-2026

output.agency: The PG&E Corporation Foundation (in partnership with California Restaurant Foundation)
output.application_docs: California-based restaurant owners and commercial caterers in PG&E's service area can apply. Applicants can have up to five locations (although only one location can apply). Annual revenue cannot exceed $3 million for the location. The restaurant must be in operation for one full year to qualify, and previous grant recipients are eligible to apply for a different location or concept. Existing food businesses that are expanding into a brick-and-mortar location are also eligible to apply.
output.geography: Northern and Central California (PG&E's service area)

results.input: Bay Area Air Quality Management District BAAQMD commercial vehicle grants and clean air business funding programs 2025-2026

output.agency: Bay Area Air Quality Management District (BAAQMD)
output.application_docs: Application form, documentation of existing engine/equipment (information, serial number, GVWR, usage documentation), quotes from dealer for replacement equipment, engine executive order, documentation of fleet registration with CARB and compliance with regulations.
output.matching_requirement: Co-funding allowed, no strict matching requirement specified.
output.max_award: Up to $240,000 for Light- and Medium-Heavy Duty trucks; Up to $520,000 for Heavy-Heavy Duty trucks

results.input: Solano County small business micro-grants emergency business funding programs 2025-2026

output.agency: Workforce Development Board of Solano County
output.application_docs: Valid business license, completed IRS Form W-9

results.input: City of Vallejo small business grants emergency funding programs 2025-2026

output.agency: City of Vallejo, Vallejo City Manager’s Office
output.application_docs: Proof of 501(c)3 nonprofit status, IRS Letter of Determination; In good standing with the California Secretary of State, Active Status; Registered with the CA Attorney General office, Current Status; Proof of General Liability Insurance, including SAMS coverage when working with minors; Current Vallejo Business License
output.deadline: Application opens January 13, 2025; Application Deadline: March 23, 2025, at 12:00 PM PDT
output.matching_requirement: Not explicitly stated as a matching requirement for the applicant; awards partially offset costs.
output.max_award: Up to 25% of the anticipated total event budget or 100% of the anticipated cost of city services, whichever is higher. Final amount allocated will be announced following the adoption of the City’s 2025-26 budget in June 2025.

output.application_docs: Register for free, complete a Digital Ready course or event, and submit an application.
output.program_name: California $5,000 Grant (Verizon’s Small Business Digital Ready Grant)
